title: Job Data Engineering Pipeline
description: Complete end-to-end data engineering project featuring web scraping, ETL pipeline, SQLite data warehouse, SQL analysis, and Power BI dashboard. Demonstrates full data lifecycle from collection to visualization for job market analysis.

title: AI Weather Prediction for Hikers
description: Machine learning application that predicts weather conditions specifically tailored for hiking activities. Uses AI algorithms to provide hikers with accurate weather forecasts and safety recommendations for outdoor adventures.
